title: Tyre Inflator Air Compressor - Digital Car Tyre Pump 12V DC,Portable Car Accessories for Men,Electric Air Pump 150 PSI For Car Tyres,Bikes,Football,Preset Tyre Pressure & Auto Shutoff
features: 【Digital Screen, Real-Time Pressure and Modes Display】：This Ipflin tyre inflator has a large digital screen that displays the real-time pressure of the tyre and the mode of inflation, giving you an accurate and intuitive reading experience, the digital display readout avoids the reading error of the traditional dial tyre pumps; the ice-green display is different from the black-and-white font display, which is also able to be read clearly under strong light.

【Preset Tyre Pressure & Auto Shutoff】: You just need to start the engine, plug the cigarette lighter into the car's 12V power outlet, link the tyres, press the‘Switch button’to select the mode, and then press the‘+’and ‘-’buttons to preset the required pressure.When the Portable tyre inflator reaches the required pressure,the digital air compressor will automatically switch off, so you don't have to worry about over-inflation.

【Rapid inflation】: For tyres of size 195/65 R15, this car tyre inflator can raise the air pressure from 30 PSI to 36 PSI in 1 minute and from 0 PSI to 36 PSI in 5 minutes (note: it can work continuously for 15 minutes).

【Extra Long Power Cable And Multi-Functional Emergency LED Lights】:The car tyre pump comes with a 0.48 metre hose and a 3 metre power cable that can be easily attached to any tyre. The top is also equipped with 4 LED light modes (illuminated/double flashing/strobe/SOS) to illuminate you in dark environments for easy inflation and as an emergency light in case of emergency.

【Meet More Inflatability Needs】: This Ipflin air compressor tyre inflator for different pumping modes comes with 2 nozzles, 1 needle valve adapter, 1 Presta-Schrader adapter, a fuse, and a user manual. Universally suitable for car, bike, basketball and swimming ring needs, this digital inflator pump is handy car accessory. If you have any questions or concerns, please feel free to contact us.

【Caution】1. Please check the user manual before use and follow the steps in the manual. If you have any questions, please feel free to contact customer service.2. Replacement fuse is included in the package. If there is a problem when the product is not in use, you can check if the fuse is blown and replace it before use.3. This tyre inflator does not contain a battery and is powered by a 12V car cigarette lighter. It needs to be connected to the car cigarette lighter for use.
